textByHashes.00250843dec36ff2630ae9811aaa35e9b7ae9c31: Welcome to the church of Holy Saradomin!
textByHashes.8a4d4c72a12ca06035f5802a591a4eac05087677: Surely you have heard of the god, Saradomin?
textByHashes.b8ca696fb2c77ccccc4941aa6d242acb67677e07: He who creates the forces of goodness and purity in this world? I cannot believe your ignorance!
textByHashes.e2b275c8d92df048d8892c6752ba01026dacd26d: Not just A god! Saradomin is the god with more followers than any other! At least in this part of the world.
textByHashes.675a84c625f7322d2007f01e18a3d44377b72f3e: Which god do you cave goblins worship?
textByHashes.c6775be30ca81167ea813ce83de13e9f17bfefcc: Sounds like Zamorak to me! Or one of the minor gods who followed him.
textByHashes.41aef99b3491dada22a8a159151b1abc4119a41d: Saradomin would never be so barbaric.
textByHashes.81d7a6edd2c6194e95062f040a317e6c96fa7fbe: We do have stories about a war between the gods. I had always interpreted them as symbolic of the spiritual war between light and darkness in our hearts.
textByHashes.7f23f9fc766e4903d136b4eb9af491a7f3925198: I am sure they were engaged in a noble struggle, although perhaps on the wrong side!
textByHashes.6c5ae19afd45eb6ca70f0e1e28076031b469644e: Saradomin was fighting to bring goodness and order to the universe, but Zamorak was leading the forces of darkness in a bid to bring eternal night to the world!
textByHashes.4c506604f660c9e4315da609388a2505c0b35dc3: Quite right! The Dorgeshuun have just had bad experiences of them.
textByHashes.80fa747904feb44460cf8a33d6c0deaf8667d4ba: Exactly! You Dorgeshuun have lived in darkness for too long. But now you can come into the light of Holy Saradomin!
textByHashes.542c16998a21a6b06f0dfe82f2c54278291885a0: May Saradomin bless you in all your pursuits!
textByHashes.69fb15f3a9687875e64f2f359ce15f8b8f087821: Welcome to the church of holy Saradomin.
textByHashes.3b3a5a7518559f7f7a2b64bc89e40e0f733a819d: That's lucky, I need someone to do a quest for me.
textByHashes.51b5913649ff40e60a5332416fd05732ba7d8717: Thank you. The problem is, there is a ghost in the church graveyard. I would like you to get rid of it.
textByHashes.b6f5052d75cb254480c95217a403aaca93d383f6: If you need any help, my friend Father Urhney is an expert on ghosts.
textByHashes.80969f756e7473fc911bd93d3d34a8adfa1e9bf3: I believe he is currently living as a hermit in Lumbridge swamp. He has a little shack in the far west of the swamps.
textByHashes.7362abdff92cdb2bd45e69b4bdc71736618d0ee6: Exit the graveyard through the south gate to reach the swamp. I'm sure if you told him that I sent you he'd be willing to help.
textByHashes.852c88ac3564690468c30f9dba997a2cbac38238: My name is Father Aereck by the way. Pleased to meet you.
textByHashes.44962804b29b570c252f2063d90c84ad8f8eab8b: Take care travelling through the swamps, I have heard they can be quite dangerous.
textByHashes.762faaefc7a754f637b08e3c7ef9a4792b27806b: Oh well. If you do have some spare time on your hands, come back and talk to me.
textByHashes.edea9359eedd2cf03160cd82a5249a6885c3a63e: Have you got rid of the ghost yet?
textByHashes.8c2183744238d7fa5bcd33132dc4c84be1d2dc54: Well, you can get to the swamp he lives in by going south through the cemetery.
textByHashes.965b4c27d67be8b413f8607778b595a1717b02d8: You'll have to go right into the far western depths of the swamp, near the coastline. That is where his house is.
textByHashes.4f5e28e2d875882bb29a96f33c345c36021acb0f: I always wondered what that amulet was... Well, I hope it's useful. Tell me when you get rid of the ghost!
textByHashes.ebe417a6d8af5a252aec709625c755b6f366137a: Hmmmmm. Well, I haven't seen any skulls.
textByHashes.f7810c96b72e453de6f093b22e8dbb1815da753f: Great! Put it in the ghost's coffin and see what happens!
textByHashes.3d73ec73f21e0b0f10314a84cf2ba959209772f1: This is the god with more followers than any other! ...At least in this part of the world.
textByHashes.5a709cb57d515b9d9647e9154dcee7b8fc310ebb: He who created this world along with his brothers Guthix and Zamorak?
textByHashes.17ca0f5164d195f34a21ef8b0c0c368c972952c6: I thought things not from this world were all... You know. Slime and tentacles.
textByHashes.b0bdd5eeed27fb071338145a9234687ce742e622: Aargh! Avaunt foul creature from another dimension! Avaunt! Begone in the name of Saradomin!
textByHashes.2661729e8da324f4900f4fa0cdfffb5c51d8b457: It is, isn't it? It was built over 230 years ago.
textByHashes.ebde008d14588e03f2a36ad4576b00635401d6f0: Thank you for getting rid of that awful ghost for me! May Saradomin always smile upon you!
textByHashes.f3d55ac191ef422bf4a730f60c87c20cc3512860: Sorry, I only had the one quest.
textByHashes.f701304a10b3fc155675a4d66ee6277deb4163f7: I'd give you a reward, but you don't seem to have any space for it. Come back when you do.
textByHashes.13d06479bfdb6b85da738af61c49245e7bb4854f: Well, it's still nice of you to bring the message here. Here, I shall bless you...
textByHashes.980590ba9bf492a3b9b6a9371d3ca38e242d9220: Well, maybe you'll find a use for these seeds?
textByHashes.f435d0038a1866207fb8949fca6afb7ceae5c8bd: Well, maybe you'll have a use for these?
textByHashes.d2298b3841ea434017b89e9d71566932d23a716e: I suppose gems are always acceptable rewards!
textByHashes.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHashes.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
